name: churnkey
description: Reads Churnkey cancel-flow sessions and aggregated session counts through the Churnkey Data API, and sends usage/billing events and customer attribute updates through the Churnkey Event Tracking API.

risk.read: external Churnkey API read of cancel-flow session and customer data
risk.write: external mutation of Churnkey customer event/attribute data used to drive cancel-flow targeting; approval required
